name: GPIBGetIntResult
title: GPIBGetIntResult
description: Helper functions for extracting numeric values from GPIB response strings.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The string in buffer, which may have been obtained by the GPIBResponse function, is searched for an integer number: All non-digit characters in the string as well as all digits found after the first comma character or decimal point are ignored, when assembling the integer number.
